subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! Upon thee be My glory and My mercy! The entire world hath come into being for this Most Mighty, Most Holy Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و ورقتی علیک بهائی و رحمتی جمیع عالم از برای این یوم امنع اقدس بوجود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement
